# GitHub Copilot / AI — qb-linq

Header-only C++17 library: CMake target **`qb::linq`**, public include **`<qb/linq.h>`**.

Before large edits, read (in order):

1. **[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md)** — where code lives, how to verify.
2. **[`docs/BUILDING.md`](../docs/BUILDING.md)** — CMake options and presets (matches `CMakeLists.txt`).
3. **[`docs/LLM_CONTEXT.md`](../docs/LLM_CONTEXT.md)** — implementation layout.
4. **[`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)** — tests, PR expectations, changelog for user-visible changes.

User-facing API: **[`README.md`](../README.md)** · docs index: **[`docs/README.md`](../docs/README.md)** · **[`CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)** · security: **[`SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md)**.
